questions.question: Which means 'already'?
questions.explanation: 已经 (yǐjīng) = already, usually paired with sentence-final 了.

questions.question: What does 睡觉 mean?
questions.explanation: 睡觉 (shuìjiào) = to sleep (literally 'sleep a sleep').

questions.question: Which means 'to work'?
questions.explanation: 工作 (gōngzuò) = to work / a job.

questions.question: What does 打电话 literally decompose into?
options: Hit + electric-words (= make a phone call)
questions.explanation: 打 (hit/strike) + 电话 (telephone) = make a phone call. 打 is the standard verb for placing a call.

questions.question: Which is the pinyin for 正在?
questions.explanation: 正在 (zhèngzài) = right now (in the middle of).

questions.question: What does 看电视 mean?
questions.explanation: 看 (watch) + 电视 (TV — 'electric vision') = watch TV.

questions.question: Which sentence means 'He has already eaten'?
questions.explanation: 已经 + V + 了 — completed transition into the eaten state.
